model.Expense

Package
Description
controller
 

  • Uses of Expense in controller

    Classes in controller that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Expense
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ExpenseTracker
    ExpenseTracker implements the Tracker interface to manage user expenses.
    Methods in controller that return types with arguments of type Expense
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Expense>
    ExpenseTracker.getExpenses()
    Gets the list of all expenses.
    List<Expense>
    ExpenseTracker.getExpensesByDateRange(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Gets all expenses within a specified date range.
    List<Expense>
    ExpenseTracker.getExpensesForMonth(int year, int month)
    Gets all expenses for a specific month.
    Methods in controller with parameters of type Expense
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ExpenseTracker.add(Expense expense)
    Adds a new expense to the tracker.
    void
    ExpenseTracker.addExpense(Expense expense)
    Legacy method to add an expense.
    void
    ExpenseTracker.edit(Expense expense)
    Edits an existing expense in the tracker.
    void
    ExpenseTracker.updateExpense(Expense expense)
    Legacy method to update an expense.
    boolean
    ExpenseTracker.validate(Expense expense)
    Validates an expense object to ensure it contains all required fields.
